name: Stable Market
description: Calm, low-volatility environment. Steady gains across most asset classes. A good baseline to compare other scenarios against.

name: Tech Crash
description: Sharp correction in technology and growth equities. Crypto sells off heavily. Investors rotate into bonds and cash as safe havens.

name: Inflation Shock
description: Inflation surges unexpectedly. Bond prices fall as real yields collapse. Cash loses purchasing power. Real assets and commodities rally strongly.

name: Rate Hike
description: Central banks raise interest rates sharply to fight inflation. Bonds reprice lower. Equities sell off. Real estate financing costs rise. Cash yields improve slightly.

name: Commodity Boom
description: Supply disruptions and geopolitical tension drive energy, metals and agricultural commodities sharply higher. Benefits commodity-heavy and real asset portfolios.
